allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach\($f in @\("icon.png","adaptive-icon.png","favicon.png","notification-icon.png"\)\){ $p="C:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\AI Remote JOBS\\assets\\images\\$f"; if\(Test-Path $p\){ $i=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($p\); "$f = $\($i.Width\)x$\($i.Height\)"; $i.Dispose\(\) } })

PowerShell($env:BROWSER="none"; $env:CI="1"; Start-Process -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "expo start --web --port 8081" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\expo-web.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\expo-web.err.log" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Write-Output "started")
PowerShell(npx eas-cli --version; Write-Output "---whoami---"; npx eas-cli whoami)
PowerShell(npx eas-cli build:list --platform android --limit 1 --non-interactive --json 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object id, status, appVersion, appBuildVersion | Format-List)
Bash(node scripts/run-sql.mjs -q "select table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema='public' order by table_name")

Bash(node scripts/run-sql.mjs -q "select kind, count\(*\) n, sum\(\(select count\(*\) from ai_task_answers a where a.task_id=ai_tasks.id\)\) keys from ai_tasks where status='published' group by kind order by kind")
